title: Work, brothel, side job, and special work execution
commitPolicy: Commit after every milestone closure or strict closure correction.

previousCompletedClaim.invalidReason: The old closure counted mapped save/session/calculation rows as closed. Under the strict source-unit rule, mapped rows are not completion evidence.

responsibilityItems: Implement the full work/brothel/side-job/special-work source behavior, not only source labels and dispatch rows.
Close result save-field effects for ABL/BASE/CFLAG/CSTR/DAY/EXP/FLAG/ITEM/JUEL/MARK/PBAND/TALENT rows with source behavior evidence.
Close work session/calculation fields for LOSEBASE, MASTER, PLAYER, TARGET, TFLAG:13, and TFLAG:14 with runtime evidence.
Close M29 inbound work-owned CFLAG:401 and FLAG:41 as implemented, approved-excluded, or scope-redesign-required.
implementationEvidence: definitions.workDefinitions contains 8 ERB-derived work listings and 72 source-label work definitions.
work/select, work/selectCharacter, work/execute, and work/cancel dispatch through GameSession.work.
applyWorkResult currently applies rewardMoney, experienceDeltas, bodyStatDeltas, assignments, careerFlagsByCharacterId, and turn completion.
verificationEvidence: npm run gate:work-coverage passed under the old row-coverage rule.
npm run gate:milestone-scope-closure -- M37 currently fails and must continue to fail while ownedBlocker is nonzero.
blockingLimitations: The 161 save-mapping rows are not proven by the current WorkDefinition effect shape.
The 6 session/calculation rows remain mapped evidence, not direct source-unit completion.
M29 inbound CFLAG:401 and FLAG:41 have no runtimeConsumerId in the M37 manifest.

verification.expectedGateResult: gate:work-coverage passes as coverage indexing; gate:milestone-scope-closure fails until 169 blockers are resolved.
